description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Test Python Lib that tests and builds a Python library on multiple platforms. The workflow should trigger on push to main, devel, and deploy branches, on pull requests, and on releases. It should run tests on Windows, Linux, and macOS with multiple Python versions, and build the library on these platforms as well as in a manylinux container. The workflow should also have a deployment job that uploads the build artifacts to PyPI.
